evaluation.summary: The simulation finds that the albedo feedback exponent is 2.299, matching the theoretical value of 2.3, but this confirmation does not constitute a new scientific breakthrough.
next_directions: Validate the power‑law scaling with observational satellite data across multiple Arctic regions
Explore non‑power‑law (e.g., exponential) feedback regimes under extreme warming scenarios
Investigate coupling between albedo feedback and cloud feedback in higher‑resolution Earth system models
